name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Milwaukee's N 76th Street TitleMax Title Loans location provides fast title loans and cash advances with extended business hours including Saturday service.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans at 7250 N 76th Street serves Milwaukee's north side with convenient title loan and cash advance services. This standalone location is open Monday through Saturday, with extended hours on Mondays and Fridays (10AM-7PM), regular hours Tuesday through Thursday (10AM-6PM), and limited Saturday hours (10AM-4PM). The storefront is closed Sundays.

At this Milwaukee, WI branch, you can apply for title loans, auto equity loans, and quick cash advances tailored to your needs. The knowledgeable staff at 414-760-0910 can answer questions about vehicle valuation, required documentation, and same-day funding options. Whether you're visiting in person or calling ahead, the N 76th Street location is ready to help you secure funds quickly.

Milwaukee residents seeking fast title loans or emergency cash should know that TitleMax on N 76th Street processes applications the same day. Bring your government-issued ID, vehicle title, proof of residency or income, and vehicle registration to complete the process efficiently. For Milwaukee borrowers who own their vehicles outright, this location offers a practical alternative to traditional loans.
pros: Same-day cash available for qualifying applicants on title pledge and flex line of credit
Accepts most credit types — vehicle title value supplements credit score in underwriting
Customers keep driving their vehicle while the title loan is active
Offers three distinct products: title pledge, secured flex line of credit, and unsecured personal line of credit
Both in-store and online application options available for unsecured line of credit
Bilingual service available at this location
5.0/5 average Google rating from 481+ reviews with consistent named-staff praise
cons: No APR or interest rate information disclosed on the website — cost of borrowing is opaque
Vehicle title required as collateral for title loans; non-repayment risks vehicle repossession
Online personal loan only available in 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Clear vehicle title required — borrowers with existing auto loans are ineligible for title products
Closed Sundays, and Saturday hours end at 4:00 pm — limited weekend access
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear title who need same-day cash and have poor or thin credit
Memphis-area residents who prefer in-person service with bilingual support
Borrowers in approved states seeking an unsecured revolving line of credit with flexible draw terms
Consumers who have been declined by traditional lenders and need emergency funds quickly
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for car owners with a clear title and poor credit who need fast access to cash and cannot qualify for traditional personal loans. The main caveat is significant: APR is not disclosed on the website, title loans are among the highest-cost consumer credit products available, and failure to repay puts the borrower's vehicle at risk.
services: Secured flex line of credit (revolving, draw as needed)
Unsecured flexible line of credit (in-store and online)
Credit check with alternative underwriting using vehicle value
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 7250 N 76th Street, Milwaukee, WI. Quick title loans and cash advances.
